title: Vegan Gigantes Plaki
description: A hearty vegan twist on the classic Greek Gigantes Plaki, made with pungent garlic, crunchy onions, and tender gigantes beans.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook, stirring occasionally, for 4-5 minutes or until fragrant and lightly golden.
Add the chopped onion and cook, stirring occasionally, for 5-7 minutes or until softened and lightly caramelized.
Add the gigantes beans, tomato paste, oregano, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Stir in the lemon juice and continue cooking for an additional 2 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or oregano if desired.
